Title: Rosenberg, Pierre
Overview: Director of the Musée du Louvre, 1994-. He succeeded Michel Laclotte as director of the Louvre in 1994.
Sources: Riding, Alan. "Louvre's New Director Shifts Gaze From Poussin to Security Problems; Louvre's New Director Shifts Gaze From Poussin." New York Times February 6, 1995, p. C11;
